title: Savory German Ginger Schnitzel
description: A twist on the classic German dish, adding the spicy flavor of ginger to the breading. Easy to make and delicious to eat.
instructions: Prepare the breading station: mix flour, ginger, and quickfix in a shallow dish.
Season the pork chops with salt and pepper.
Dip each pork chop in the flour mixture, coating both sides evenly.
Heat a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add a tablespoon of oil to the skillet and swirl to coat.
Add the coated pork chops to the skillet and cook for 2-3 minutes per side.
Reduce heat to medium-low and continue cooking for an additional 5-7 minutes.
Remove the pork chops from the skillet and let rest for a few minutes.
